_note: Synthetic generic contract — no real client/deal/counterparty/firm content (repo privacy rule). Drives the F11 recommendation grounding/citation/honesty risk gate: grounded + cited, propose-vs-counter, framed on the reasonableness spectrum, honest about a missing market benchmark (never a fabricated number).

nodes.heading: Limitation of Liability
nodes.body: The aggregate liability of either party under this Agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid in the twelve months preceding the claim.

nodes.heading: Payment Terms
nodes.body: The Customer shall pay each undisputed invoice within thirty days of the invoice date.

nodes.heading: Royalty
nodes.body: The Licensee shall pay the Licensor a royalty on Net Sales at the rate set out in Schedule A.

nodes.heading: Term and Termination
nodes.body: This Agreement runs for an initial term of two years and renews for successive one-year terms unless either party gives ninety days' notice.

issue.title: Liability cap level
issue.our_position: Cap liability at twelve months of fees.

issue.title: Shorten payment window
issue.our_position: We want each undisputed invoice paid within fifteen days.

cases.name: market gap — set the royalty rate, no benchmark provided

issue.title: Royalty rate on Net Sales
issue.our_position: We need to set the royalty rate on Net Sales.

cases.name: counter — extend the termination notice period

issue.title: Notice period for termination
issue.their_position: Extend the notice period to one hundred eighty days.
